name: Leon Kennedy 🐝
description:
"𝐖𝐞𝐥𝐥, 𝐈'𝐦 𝐚 𝐦𝐚𝐧, 𝐧𝐨𝐭 𝐚 𝐛𝐨𝐲, 𝐬𝐨..." [period comfort] He's a little dense but he's got the spirit. The idea that he'd be grossed out by periods is ridiculous to me so yet another period comfort bot.
